title: Avoid identical function implementations
description: Functions with identical implementations indicate code duplication that increases maintenance burden. When multiple functions have the same logic, changes need to be applied in multiple places, increasing the risk of inconsistencies.
recommendation: Extract common logic into shared functions or use generic implementations where appropriate.

noncompliant.description: Multiple functions implementing the same validation and save logic, leading to code duplication.

compliant.description: Extracting common logic into shared functions or using interfaces/generics to eliminate duplication.
